title: قرار مجلس ادارة الهيئة الاتحادية للرقابة النووية رقم 11: بشأن الموافقة على ترخيص اختيار موقع لبناء مرفق لإدارة النفايات المشعة
short_name: قرار مجلس ادارة الهيئة الاتحادية للرقابة النووية 11/2023

provisions.title: قرّرما يلي:
provisions.content: (5) منالقانونوبناء علىموافقة مجلسإدارة الهيئةخلال اجتماعهرقم (2) لسنة 2023المنعقد في 13أبريل 2023،قرّرما يلي:المادةالأولىعملاًبالمواد 5، 6، 23،24، 25، 28 و 32 منالقانون،بمنحمؤوسسةالاماراتللطاقةالنووية"ترخيصلإختيار موقعلبناء مرفقإدارةالنفاياتالمشعة" (ترخيصرقم: /(FANR/WF/2023/005)كما هو وارد فيالملحق 1 بهذاالقرار.

provisions.title: الموافق:22/رمضان/1444هـ
provisions.content:
يدخلهذا القرارحيز التنفيذاعتباراً منتاريخ إصدارهوينشر فيالجريدةالرسمية.صدرفيأبوظبي
بتاريخ:13/أبريل/2023م
الموافق:22/رمضان/1444هـعبداللهالسويديرئيسمجلسالإدارةنشرهذا القرار فيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم751.ص357.ResolutionNo. (11) of 2023 of the Board of Management of the Federal Authority for NuclearRegulationApprovingthe Licence for the Selection of a Site fortheConstruction of a Radioactive WasteManagementFacilityTheBoard of Management of the Federal Authority for Nuclear Regulation("FANR"):Havingconsidered:-Federal law by Decree No. (6) of 2009 Concerning the Peaceful Uses of NuclearEnergy (the "Law");-Cabinet Resolution No. (17/1 g) of 2021 on Renewal of Formation of the Board ofManagement of the Federal Authority for Nuclear Regulation;-Cabinet Resolution No. (37m/2g) of 2021 on Adding a member in the FederalAuthority for Nuclear Regulation's Board of Management;-Cabinet Resolution No. (57m/2g) of 2022 Adding Mr. Ahmed Salem Al Shamsi to theBoard of Management of the Federal Authority for Nuclear Regulation;-Cabinet Resolution No. (2/9g) of 2020 on the Guide to Board Governance in theUAE Federal Government;-Cabinet Resolution No. (12/6g) of 2021 Concerning Request to Exempt the FederalAuthority for Nuclear Regulation from the Enforcement of Some of the Provisionsof the Guide to Board Governance in the UAE Federal Government, ApprovedPursuant to the Cabinet Resolution No. (2/9g) of 2020;-FANR's Board of Management Resolution No. (15) of 2021 on Amendment No. 4 of theBy-Laws Regulating the Meetings of the Board of Management of the FederalAuthority for Nuclear Regulation;-FANR's "Safety Evaluation Report on a Licence Application for Initial SiteSelection Activities for the Near-Surface Low Level Radioactive Waste DisposalFacility" dated April 2023; andBasedon the recommendation of FANR's Director General provided to FANR's Board ofManagement pursuant to Article 15(5) of the Law and based on FANR’s Boardof Management approval during its meeting No. (02) of 2023 held on 13 April2023,Hasdecided the following:Article1Pursuantto Articles 5, 6, 23, 24, 25, 28 and 32 of the Law, to grant to Emirates NuclearEnergy Corporation PJSC ‘Licence for the Selection of a Site for theConstruction of a Radioactive Waste Management Facility' (FANR/WF/2023/005) asprovided in Annex 1 to this Resolution.Article2ThisResolution shall come into force as of the date of its issuance and shall bepublished in the Official Gazette.Issuedin Abu Dhabi
Date: 22 Ramadan 1444 AH
Corresponding to: 13 April 2023AbdullaAl SuwaidiChairmanLicenceNo.: FANR/WF/2023/005Licencefor the Selection of a Site for the Construction of aRadioactiveWaste Management FacilityUnderthe powers provided in Articles (5), (6) and (28)(3)(a) of the Federal Law byDecree No. 6 of 2009 Concerning the Peaceful Uses of Nuclear Energy (the Law),and having considered that the proposed activities of Emirates Nuclear EnergyCompany P.J.S.C. comply with the requirements of the Law and applicableregulations of the Federal Authority for Nuclear Regulation (the Authority), theAuthority hereby grants this licence for the selection of a site for theConstruction of the following Facility - Radioactive Waste Management Facility -(the Licence) to:EmiratesNuclear Energy Company P.J.S.C. (the Licensee)beinga public joint stock company established by the Abu Dhabi Law No. 8 of 2021 onthe Emirates Nuclear Energy Company “Public Joint Stock Company".ThisLicence authorizes the Licensee to conduct the following Regulated Activity setforth in Article 2(1)(a) of FANR Regulation on Disposal of Spent Fuel andRadioactive Waste (FANR- REG-27), pursuant to Article 25(15) of the Law:Selectionof a site for the Construction of a Facilityasspecified in Schedule of 1 of this Licence. The Licence conditions are set forthin Schedule 2. The description of the Regulated Activity is provided in theLicence application documents referenced in Schedule 3. Schedule 4 providesinterpretation of certain terms used in this Licence.ThisLicence shall remain in force until:a- itis suspended or revoked by the Authority; orb- itis amended by the Authority; orc- itis surrendered by the Licensee, subject to acceptance by the Authority; ord- theAuthority grants a Licence for the preparation of a site for the Construction ofa Facility.ThisLicence is granted without prejudice to any future decision by the Authorityregarding the Construction of a Radioactive Waste Management Facility or aRadioactive Waste Repository.AbdullaAl SuwaidiChairmanof the Board of Management of the Federal Authority for Nuclear RegulationIssuedin Abu Dhabi
13 April 2023ThisLicence comprises this page, the preceding pages and the following schedules,which together form an integral part of the Licence:Schedule1: (1 page) Regulated Activities AuthorisedSchedule2: (1 page) Licence ConditionsSchedule3: (1 page) Application DocumentsSchedule4: (1 page) Interpretation.Anyreference to 'schedule' in the Licence means a reference to a schedule of thisLicence.Schedule1RegulatedActivities Authorised1- ThisLicence authorises selection of a site for the Construction of a RadioactiveWaste Management Facility in the State, which shall include, inter alia,regional analysis and identification of potential sites, screening of potentialsites and identification of candidate sites, and evaluation of candidate sitesto characterize fully site-specific conditions pertinent to the Safety andsecurity of a Facility, as well as activities reasonably associated with theforegoing.2- TheLicensee is required to obtain all necessary Licence(s) from the Authority forthe conduct of any other Regulated Activity.3- TheLicensee shall obtain all necessary licences, permits and authorisations fromother government entities for the conduct of any Regulated Activities authorisedby the Authority under this Licence and update the Authority on any changerelating to the aforementioned licences, permits and authorisations.Schedule2LicenceConditionsThisLicence is subject to and the Licensee shall comply with the Licence conditionsspecified and incorporated below:1- TheLicensee shall conduct the Regulated Activity authorized by this Licence inaccordance with:a- theLaw, and any amendments thereto;b- anyapplicable regulations issued by the Authority pursuant to the Law;c- theterms and conditions of this Licence; andd- thedocuments referenced in and/or submitted with the application for this Licence(the Application Documents).2- TheLicensee shall notify the Authority of any modification to Safety-relatedaspects of the Application Documents at least 30 days prior to theirimplementation. Such modifications shall be subject to the Authority'sre-assessment and approval.3- TheLicensee shall provide the Authority with a plan and timetable for specificActivities to be undertaken under the general authority of this Licence at least30 days prior to such Activities commencing.4- TheLicensee shall provide the Authority with access to any place, to any documentor to any authorized person, and shall provide all assistance necessary toenable the Authority to inspect the authorized under this Licence RegulatedActivity in accordance with Articles (5), (35) and (36) of the Law.5- TheLicensee shall provide to the Authority within one (1) month of the end of eachcalendar year a report on the Regulated Activity carried out under this Licenceduring the previous year.6- TheLicensee shall retain any Safety-related information gathered and recordedduring the conduct of the Regulated Activity authorized by the Authority underthis Licence.Schedule3ApplicationDocumentsApplicant’sDocuments Used as a Basis for the Review1-Licence Application for Initial Site Selection Activities for the Near-SurfaceLow-Level Radioactive Waste Disposal Facility (ENEC letter Ref. No.ENA-FANR-22-0044L, dated 04 April 2022).Schedule4Interpretation1-Capitalized terms used but not defined in this Licence shall have the meaningascribed to them in Article (1) of the Federal Law by Decree No. 6 of 2009Concerning the Peaceful Uses of Nuclear Energy.[1]وردت في النصالمنشور فيالجريدةالرسمية كلمة "مؤوسسة "والأصح أنتكون " مؤسسة "،فاقتضىالتنويه.
